title: senecio erucifolius subsp. lycopifolius
intro: Senecio erucifolius subsp. lycopifolius, also known as the ragwort plant, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
